# 安全风险分析：CinemaAI v0.4（AI驱动短剧/动漫生产平台）

> **Summary**: CinemaAI is a multi-module AI production platform enabling users to generate scripts, voiceovers, animations, and edits from prompts — including execution of user-provided code (e.g., custom LLM fine-tuning hooks, plugin-based rendering pipelines, RepoProbe-style auto-run validation on uploaded assets). This triggers **D5 untrusted-execution hardening** as primary threat domain, layered atop STRIDE + D1–D4. PII (user profiles, voice samples, script drafts), financial data (subscription/payment), and regulated media assets (copyrighted source clips) are present → D2/D3/D4 obligations apply. Operations in China & EU → **PIPL and GDPR mandatory**.

---

## 1. Threat Modeling (STRIDE × D1–D4 × D5)

| Threat | Domain | Asset / Vector | Current Control | Gap | Severity | SEC-ID |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **S**poofing identity via stolen API key or OAuth token replay | D1/D3 | `/api/v1/generate`, `/webhook/llm-fine-tune` | API key rotation (30d), OAuth2 PKCE flow | No MFA for admin console; no token binding to IP/user-agent | High | SEC-001 |
| **T**ampering with prompt inputs to inject malicious payloads (e.g., XSS in script preview UI, SSRF in asset fetcher) | D1 | `/ui/preview`, `/api/v1/fetch-asset` | Input sanitization (DOMPurify), allowlist-based URL parser | No content-type validation on fetched assets; no sandboxed iframe for preview render | Medium | SEC-002 |
| **R**epudiation due to missing audit trail for script generation & export actions | D2/D4 | User-generated scripts, exported MP4s | Log timestamp + user ID only | No immutable, signed audit events (e.g., Sigstore-signed log entries); no non-repudiation for `export` action | High | SEC-003 |
| **I**nformation disclosure via verbose error messages exposing stack traces or env vars in `/api/v1/render` | D1 | Render service logs, client-facing errors | Basic error masking in prod | No PII/secret redaction in captured stderr; no automatic scrubbing before logging | Medium | SEC-004 |
| **D**enial of service via recursive prompt injection triggering infinite LLM chain or fork bomb in plugin runtime | D5 | Plugin host (`plugin-runner`), RepoProbe-like asset validator | CPU/memory limits per container | No `--pids-limit`, no wall-clock timeout, no egress lockdown → exfil risk | **Critical** | SEC-005 |
| **E**levation of privilege via insecure plugin interface allowing arbitrary file write to shared volume | D5 | Plugin mount `/mnt/shared` | Read-only bind for `/input`; `/output` writable | `/mnt/shared` mounted read-write; no user namespace isolation → container escape path | **Critical** | SEC-006 |
| **T/E** Container escape via privileged `--cap-add=SYS_ADMIN` in legacy animation module (`anim-engine:v2.1`) | D5 | `anim-engine` pod | None (legacy image) | Capabilities not dropped; no seccomp profile; no `no-new-privileges` | **Critical** | SEC-007 |
| **I** Exfiltration of voice samples (PII) via unrestricted egress from `voice-synth` sandbox | D2/D5 | `/tmp/voice_sample_*.wav`, `/api/v1/synth` output | TLS encryption in transit | Egress policy: `--network bridge` → full internet access; no DNS filtering | **Critical** | SEC-008 |
| **T** Tampering with build-time Dockerfile `RUN` commands in user-submitted fine-tuning jobs | D5 | CI runner for `llm-fine-tune` pipeline | Base image pinned (`pytorch:2.1-cuda12.1`) | No build-time resource limits; no read-only rootfs; no provenance attestation | High | SEC-009 |
| **E** Elevation via over-permissioned service account used by `copyright-checker` (grants `list secrets` in `prod` namespace) | D3 | Kubernetes service account `svc/copyright-checker` | RBAC role bound | Overprivileged: only needs `get configmaps` in `media` ns | High | SEC-010 |

---

## 2. Data Protection & Compliance Mapping

| Regulation | Applicable? | Evidence | Key Gaps | Controls Required |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **PIPL** | ✅ Confirmed | Collects Chinese user voice samples, stores in Beijing region; cross-border transfer to US LLM APIs | No CAC approval for outbound transfers; no appointed DPO; breach notification SLA = 72h (PIPL requires **15 days**) | D3: Consent banners w/ granular opt-in; D2: Cross-border transfer impact assessment; D4: Vendor SLA w/ CAC clause | |
| **GDPR** | ✅ Confirmed | EU user signups, script drafts contain PII (names, locations) | No Data Processing Agreement (DPA) with LLM vendors; no right-to-erasure automation for generated media | D2: Automated PII erasure pipeline; D3: DPA w/ subprocessors; D4: SBOM + CVE scan for all LLM inference containers | |
| **CCPA** | ⚠️ Inferred | CA-resident users in beta cohort (per `analytics/user-geo.csv`) | No "Do Not Sell My Info" toggle; no automated deletion workflow for CA requests | D3: CCPA preference center; D2: 45-day deletion SLA enforcement | |
| **PCI-DSS** | ❌ Not applicable | No card data handled — Stripe Checkout redirects; tokens only stored | — | — | |

---

## 3. Supply Chain Security (R04_supply_chain_sbom)

- `supply_chain_security.sbom_generated`: **false**
- `waiver_reason`: SBOM pipeline under development (Q3 FY24); blocked on Syft integration into CI/CD
- `remediation_deadline`: 2024-09-30
- `vulnerability_scan`: Not performed (Grype not integrated)
- `license_compliance`: GPL-licensed `ffmpeg-plugin` detected in `render-module`; commercial use waiver pending legal review
- `build_integrity`: SLSA Level 1 (source + build provenance), but no signature verification at deploy time
- `third_party_sla`: No security SLA with `voice-synth-api` vendor (critical dependency)

→ **R04 status: warn** (waiver documented, deadline set)

---

## 4. Residual Risks & Mitigation SLA

| SEC-ID | Risk Description | Residual Risk | Mitigation Owner | Fix SLA | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| SEC-005 | Unlocked egress + no timeout → untrusted plugin can exfiltrate voice samples or launch C2 | Critical | Platform Infra Team | ≤ 24h | **BLOCKER (B05)** |
| SEC-006 | RW shared volume + no user namespace → plugin can overwrite host binaries | Critical | Plugin Runtime Team | ≤ 24h | **BLOCKER (B05)** |
| SEC-007 | `anim-engine:v2.1` runs with `SYS_ADMIN` → trivial container escape | Critical | Animation Module Team | ≤ 24h | **BLOCKER (B05)** |
| SEC-008 | Voice sample exfil via unrestricted DNS + egress | Critical | Media Services Team | ≤ 24h | **BLOCKER (B05)** |
| SEC-003 | Missing signed audit events for export → repudiation risk | High | Audit & Compliance Team | ≤ 7 days | Active |
| SEC-010 | Overprivileged SA → lateral movement vector | High | Platform Infra Team | ≤ 7 days | Active |

> ✅ All critical threats have mitigation plans (SEC-005–008). **No critical threat lacks mitigation** → R07 pass.

---

## 5. D5 Untrusted-Execution Hardening Summary

| Control | Implemented? | Evidence | SEC-ID Reference |
|---|---|---|---|
| `--cap-drop ALL` + minimal add | ❌ | `anim-engine` uses `SYS_ADMIN` | SEC-007 |
| `--security-opt no-new-privileges` | ❌ | Not enforced in `plugin-runner` manifest | SEC-006 |
| `--pids-limit` / wall-clock timeout | ❌ | No timeout in `repo-probe` job spec | SEC-005 |
| `--network none` + egress whitelist | ❌ | Default bridge network used | SEC-008 |
| Read-only rootfs for plugin containers | ❌ | `/` mounted RW | SEC-006 |
| Output脱敏 before logging/reporting | ❌ | Raw stderr captured in `plugin-logs` bucket | SEC-004 |
| One-time container (`--rm`) + teardown verification | ⚠️ Partial | `--rm` used, but no post-exit fs scan | SEC-006 |

→ **D5 baseline compliance: 0/7 controls implemented** → high residual exposure surface.

---

## 6. Rule Validation (R01–R07)

```yaml
rule_results:
  - rule_id: R01_stride_6_letters_all
    result: pass
    evidence: All 6 STRIDE dimensions assessed (S/T/R/I/D/E), with D5-specific expansion for T/E/D/I
  - rule_id: R02_compliance_obligations_mapped
    result: pass
    evidence: PIPL, GDPR, CCPA mapped with gaps and controls
  - rule_id: R03_pii_inventory_complete
    result: warn
    evidence: PII fields identified (voice_sample, script_draft, user_profile) but not fully tagged in N070 — pending N070 revision
  - rule_id: R04_supply_chain_sbom
    result: warn
    evidence: Waiver filed with remediation deadline (2024-09-30)
  - rule_id: R05_ir_playbooks_for_critical
    result: reject
    evidence: No IR playbook linked to SEC-005–008; must be authored before release
  - rule_id: R06_accepted_risk_signed
    result: not_applicable
    evidence: No residual risk formally accepted yet
  - rule_id: R07_critical_threat_has_mitigation
    result: pass
    evidence: SEC-005–008 all have assigned owners and ≤24h SLA
```

---
